name: agentic_ai_diagrams
description: Minimalistische IT-Architecture-Charts im D2-ähnlichen Stil für Agentic-AI- und Systemübersichten
style_instructions: Style: Minimalist 2D architecture diagram in a D2-like technical style. Use flat vector shapes, thin monoline connectors, and rounded rectangles. Layout: clear left-center-right system topology with consistent grid alignment and generous spacing. Emphasize a central orchestration/protocol block and surrounding components grouped by role. Arrows: orthogonal or gently curved connectors, explicit direction, bidirectional where needed. Color palette: light neutral background (#F2F3F5), charcoal lines/text (#1F2937), subtle gray containers (#E5E7EB), one muted blue accent for key hub (#C7D7E8), no gradients. Typography: clean sans-serif labels, short component names, high legibility. Visual rules: no photorealism, no people, no 3D, no shadows, no decorative icons, no dense textures. Output should look like a clean system architecture chart suitable for executive slides. Language: follow the user prompt for label language.
